sam-abhi-√vṛt Ā. -vartate, to go towards, advance,  MBh. ;
to attack, assail,  Hariv. ;
to come near, approach,  MBh. ;
to turn back, return, recur,  Suśr. ;
to remain, continue (tūṣṇīm, ‘silent’),  R. ;
w.r. for sam-ati-√vṛt.
